title: Fig. 3 in Comparison of the modified agglutination test and real-time PCR for detection of Toxoplasma gondii exposure in feral cats from Phillip Island, Australia, and risk factors associated with infection
author: Adriaanse, Katherine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Predicted lines of fit for the multivariable logistic regression model plotted as probability of Toxoplasma gondii qPCR positivity in feral cats on Phillip Island (Victoria) versus body weight for each season. Dashed lines show 95% confidence intervals.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Predicted lines of fit for the multivariable logistic regression model plotted as probability of Toxoplasma gondii qPCR positivity in feral cats on Phillip Island (Victoria) versus body weight for each season. Dashed lines show 95% confidence intervals.
